differential_diagnoses: Dilated cardiomyopathy secondary to chronic alcohol use
Coronary embolic phenomenon from an apical thrombus
next_steps: Implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) implantation for primary prevention
Genetic counseling and panel testing for cardiomyopathy
Review of cardiac MRI patterns by a specialized cardiac imaging team to assess for inflammatory or infiltrative etiologies
Genetic counseling and comprehensive cardiomyopathy panel testing
Implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) implantation for primary prevention
Formal cardiac sarcoidosis evaluation (PET/CT and review of CMR patterns by subspecialists)
Long-term ambulatory rhythm monitoring to guide arrhythmia management
